candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When internal regime is MOMENTUM but TradingView shows 0 confirming signals (confidence <= 65%), the 30-indicator single-pair conviction must clear 100% before that pair is tradable at full internal size.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: Internal-only regime detection with no external corroboration is prone to labeling range noise as momentum; institutional flow that produces a durable trend leaves footprints across multiple venues, so a signal invisible to a second independent data source (TV) is disproportionately likely to be a fakeout being sized on stale internal state.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if regime_confirmation.tv_signals == 0 and regime_confirmation.confidence <= 0.65 and consensus.conviction < 1.00: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # only AUDNZD (100% conv, SHORT) survives full sizing today
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Sharpe +0.02 to +0.04 by suppressing low-conviction MOMENTUM entries that add variance without directional edge; reduces drawdown contribution from unconfirmed regime whipsaws.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Current state shows Internal=MOMENTUM but TV=UNKNOWN (0 signals) at 75% sizing, while consensus is FLAT on GBPUSD (conv 0%), NEUTRAL on AUDUSD (conv 17%), and only AUDNZD reaches 100% SHORT — three of five pairs would be traded on internal-only conviction with no external backing.

retirement_flag.reason: L9 mandates CONFIRMED hypotheses get an implementation commit or REJECTED status with an expiry — with 0 trades in 7 days and RQ-006 blocked until 30+ trades, several validated lessons risk drifting past their expiry unverified; L9 itself needs a freshness audit.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades for 7 consecutive days with regime=UNKNOWN and internal/external regime disagreement resolved only at 65% confidence — the system is correctly conservative but is accumulating no fresh evidence, so all reasoning-grounded lessons remain harvest-only until the paper-trade counter unblocks RQ-006.
